metadata.description: Add example Likert table to supplementary and create change summary document for Google Doc sharing

summary: Created two deliverables for labmate sharing: (1) Updated MANUSCRIPT_FOR_GOOGLE_DOCS.md with all recent changes synced (H2 fix, repeated sentence removal, methods text update, Likert example table added to supplementary section with 25 representative examples). (2) Created NHB2026_CHANGE_SUMMARY.md documenting all 4 categories of changes with old/new text comparisons, rationale, and reviewer guidance questions.
